transcript: Speaker A: I have big dreams. A good job. Money for my family. Pride in myself. English is my key to that better life. Some days, I'm tired. Lazy. Bored looking at books. But I tell myself: 'Keep going.' Just 10 minutes with MySivi. That's all I need. Mistakes? MySivi's AI teacher helps me learn from them. I don't need perfection. I just need to try. Step by step - Day by day. MySivi helps me grow. When doubt hits, I remember my goals. I open MySivi. Deep breath. Begin again. Every sentence I speak? A small victory. Every conversation? One step closer to my dreams. I'm not competing with others. Just with yesterday's version of me. MySivi shows me that progress every single day. One day, I'll look back and say: 'I did it. I didn't give up.' Today, I choose MySivi. Because my future starts now. And I want it to be bright. Download MySivi at ₹1. Your transformation starts today.

He emphasizes self-improvement, learning from mistakes with an AI teacher, and taking small daily steps. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app for just ₹1.
